name: EGB OE TL.Z./WACKER CHEMIE
summary: Wacker Chemie AG is a global chemical company headquartered in Munich, Germany, producing a wide range of specialty chemical products. Its products include silicones, polymers, polysilicon, and biosolutions, which are used in various industries, including construction, electronics, automotive, and consumer goods. Wacker Chemie focuses on innovation and sustainable solutions.
